heading: A structured 4-8 month path to your new home.
subtext: Every date and every dollar projected before the process starts.

steps.title: Qualify & Plan
steps.description: Full financial model — CPF limits, TDSR, closing costs, cash position. If you should wait, we tell you.

steps.title: Sell High
steps.description: Professional photography, multi-platform listings, automated buyer follow-ups. Maximum price, not fastest sale.

steps.title: Buy Smart
steps.description: Data-driven condo selection using 9 proprietary frameworks. 10+ comparable transactions analyzed per project.

steps.title: Execute
steps.description: Timeline coordination, vendor management, loan and CPF processing. Keys in hand — no temporary housing.
